title: Inventory Systems in C++
description: Design modular inventory systems in Unreal C++ using data assets, structures, and actor components.
learningObjectives: Define item data structures using USTRUCT and Data Assets
Implement an Actor Component managing array slots and items
Expose item properties for usage in UMG UI widgets

sections.title: Item Data Assets and Inventory Component
sections.content:
Designing inventories in C++ involves separating item static templates (definition) from dynamic instance data:

1. **UPrimaryDataAsset**: Stores static properties of an item type (icon, name, description, static mesh).
2. **FInventorySlot**: Stores dynamic instance parameters (quantity, durability, metadata).
3. **UActorComponent**: Manages the array of slots and implements add/remove item routines.

sections.title: Inventory Slot Structure
